title: Building a $1,000,000 Business for a Stranger in 26 Minutes
creator: alexhormozi
rationale: Single-stranger $1M variant — direct comparison to OQf2Ba ($2.5M, Wave-6) and Wr6n_zNKvMk ($1M/69min, Wave-7-batch1). 3-way tier comparison ($1M vs $2.5M vs $12M from MH-IMJxbUY4) reveals whether the chassis scales with revenue tier.
